{{Infobox group
| name = Aurelian Alliance
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aurelian Alliance]] is a new government formed after the end of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aurelian Alliance]] is a loose agreement between regional governors and the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aurelian Alliance]] is in its early days.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
